use_cases: Displaying feature highlights with title, description, and supporting content
Creating modular card layouts for product or service listings
Building content sections with consistent card-based structure
Organizing information with clear visual hierarchy using card components
ai_summary: A versatile card component with modular sub-components (CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) for flexible content display. Built with standard Tailwind classes featuring subtle shadows and clean borders. This minimalist design serves as a foundational UI building block for displaying featured content, product highlights, or informational sections in SaaS and product interfaces.
